messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Worker prompt hierarchy is strict: Gov adversarial baton, structured canonical state, then artifact context.
Raw accumulating transcript injection is forbidden; use structured state and artifact refs only.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

WARN-GAC-087 mandates separate status check. Action boundary remains open. Dependency on status-class resolution prevents activation closure.

next_worker_baton.objective: Verify whether calibration-status class can be closed before 2026-06-28 activation. Inspect source documents for authoritative calibration-status determination. If CP-77 is confirmed APPROVED, the status-class defect is repaired and action may close. If CP-77 remains PENDING or is DENIED, the boundary remains open and activation cannot proceed.
next_worker_baton.attack_focus: Verify exact calibration-status class value in source documents. Do not accept adjacent, approximate, or inferred status. Determine if authoritative source confirms APPROVED status for calibration pack CP-77. If confirmed, repair dependency ledger and recommend closure. If not confirmed, preserve ESCALATE and require explicit calibration approval before activation.
required_repairs: Obtain authoritative calibration-status class determination from source documents
Confirm whether CP-77 calibration pack is APPROVED, PENDING, or DENIED
Resolve 082-style status-class trap by definitive status verification
Update dependency ledger to CLOSED if status-class confirmed APPROVED
If status-class confirmed APPROVED, re-evaluate against STD-GAC-087-P for closure

state_brief.pinned_best_artifact_full_text:
{
  "boundary_binding": {
    "action_boundary": "May operations activate the production device group?",
    "allow_rule_assessment": "No exact match; pending calibration-status class blocks closure per policy.",
    "binding_class": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN",
    "controlling_source_fact": "STD-GAC-087-P requires calibration-status class match before activation; CAL-GAC-087 shows CP-77 pending.",
    "escalate_rule_assessment": "Narrow defect open: calibration pack pending and status-class verification required.",
    "timing_scope_authority_dependency_check": "Authority CAL-GAC-087 matches group/site/date/RC but status-class remains unresolved before 2026-06-28 execution."
  },
  "cited_evidence": [
    "CAL-GAC-087",
    "STD-GAC-087-P",
    "WARN-GAC-087"
  ],
  "critical_features_preserved": [
    "source IDs exact",
    "action boundary not closed"
  ],
  "final_answer": "Action may not proceed. Source records show calibration authority matches group, site, RC-12 and date but calibration-status class verification remains pending per CAL-GAC-087 and STD-GAC-087-P. WARN-GAC-087 requires separate status check. Boundary open; escalate for defect resolution before activation.",
  "open_blockers": [
    "082-style status-class trap unresolved",
    "CP-77 calibration pack pending"
  ],
  "verification_verdict": "ESCALATE",
  "worker_role": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_MAPPER"
}

task_and_answer_contract.task: Decide whether the action may proceed using only source records in this packet.
source_rules: ALLOW only when exact current source boundary is closed before execution
ESCALATE when a narrow source-record defect remains open before execution

structured_canonical_state.current_turn_command: Act under the baton. If state and Gov conflict, flag the conflict in open_blockers.

action.description: May operations activate the production device group?

context.action_boundary: May operations activate the production device group?
context.anomaly_observed: A lab-device warning remains visible; activation requires abstract calibration-status class.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Activation ACT-GAC-087 enables production device group GD-4 at Site P2 under release condition RC-12 on 2026-06-28.
Device warning WARN-GAC-087 says lab and production units share prefixes and calibration status must be separately verified.
Calibration authority CAL-GAC-087 covers production device group GD-4, Site P2, release condition RC-12, and activation date 2026-06-28; current QA-approved calibration pack CP-77 remains pending.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Production device activation is complete only when calibration authority matches device group, production site, release condition, activation date, and calibration-status class before activation.
